creator: phil.pennock@globnix.org
text:
This appears to be the fix to the new "Lucky Thirteen" attack, so expect
updates for other SSL libraries too.

http://arstechnica.com/security/2013/02/lucky-thirteen-attack-snarfs-cookies-protected-by-ssl-encryption/
http://www.isg.rhul.ac.uk/tls/TLStiming.pdf
